Pf.</PRIZE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":33,"explanation":"Corrected encoding artifacts (mojibake) mapping to German characters (ü, ä, ß) and format abbreviations (4to, 8vo). Fixed malformed XML closing tag (</PRICE> to </PRIZE>). Corrected OCR errors in book titles (Tempe Helvetica, Homeri Ilias & Odyss., Valer. Max.). Standardized the price separator 'à'. Corrected currency symbol 'ß' (Schilling) and interpreted garbled price '12. 2. Pfund' as '1 1/2 Pfund'."}

parsed.explanation: Corrected encoding artifacts (mojibake) mapping to German characters (ü, ä, ß) and format abbreviations (4to, 8vo). Fixed malformed XML closing tag (</PRICE> to </PRIZE>). Corrected OCR errors in book titles (Tempe Helvetica, Homeri Ilias & Odyss., Valer. Max.). Standardized the price separator 'à'. Corrected currency symbol 'ß' (Schilling) and interpreted garbled price '12. 2. Pfund' as '1 1/2 Pfund'.
